scripts.test: npm run test:blockhash && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:dataTypes && npm run test:load && npm run test:load10k && npm run test:loadecho && npm run test:solidvm && npm run test:upload && npm run test:upload10k && npm run test:loadFF && npm run test:truchainz && npm run test:multicontract && npm run test:uploadOrder && npm run test:slipstream
scripts.test:e2e: mocha -r ts-node/register e2e/createUser.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register e2e/import.constructor.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register e2e/import.test.ts
scripts.test:dataTypes: mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/address.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/bool.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/bytes.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/enum.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/string.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/uint.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register regressions/negative.test.ts
scripts.test:load: mocha -r ts-node/register load/stratoLoad.test.ts --batchCount 20 --batchSize 20 && mocha -r ts-node/register load/stratoLoadFactory.test.ts --batchCount 20 --batchSize 20
scripts.test:truchainz: mocha -r ts-node/register e2e/createChain.test.ts && mocha -r ts-node/register e2e/governance.test.ts
